svg.title: Valve Rack Assembly — Orthographic Drawing
svg.desc: Three-view orthographic projection of the 10-valve rack (5x2 grid). Scale: 3.5 px/mm. All caliper-verified dimensions in mm. Axis convention (valve-oriented): X = width (across valve body, perpendicular to tube flow) Y = depth (along tube flow, port-to-port) Z = height (vertical, bottom of white body to spade tips) Front view (looking along -Y): H=X, V=Z (SVG y inverted: top=Z_max) Side view (looking along -X): H=Y, V=Z (SVG y inverted: top=Z_max) Top view (looking along -Z): H=X, V=Y (SVG y = Y, increasing rearward)
svg.text: Valve Rack Assembly — 10x Beduan 2-Way NC Solenoid (5W x 2H)
Scale 3.5 px/mm | Dimensions in mm (caliper-verified) | 37mm valve pitch c-c

g.text: front (Y=0, tube ports) at top; rear (spade connectors) at bottom
5. No built-in mounting features on valve
7. QC tube ports along Y axis (both ends)
8. Spade connectors at Z-top, parallel to Y
